description_long: This object is a rectangular box with a predominantly pink and white color scheme, featuring a zigzag pattern on the lower portion and a solid pink upper section. The front face displays a central circular image of a chocolate, surrounded by small icon illustrations of chocolates and confections. The box has a flap that is partially open, revealing a white interior with a repeating chevron pattern. The sides of the box include a profile silhouette illustration and a block of text, while the top and front are decorated with additional small icons and badges. The overall appearance suggests it is a confectionery gift box, likely for chocolates, with a visually appealing and modern design.
description: A pink and white rectangular box with a zigzag pattern, chocolate imagery, and decorative icons, resembling a confectionery gift box.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pink face with a profile silhouette, block of text, and the partially open white flap with a chevron pattern.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the pink cover with chocolate imagery, decorative icons, and badges, as well as the zigzag patterned lower section.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the pink face, profile silhouette, and open flap, but from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main pink cover with chocolate imagery, badges, and the open white flap revealing the interior chevron pattern.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration features a realistic image of a chocolate confection centered on the cover, surrounded by small, simple line icons of chocolates and sweets. The style is clean and modern, with a focus on appetizing visual appeal.
